title: RNA-Seq invivo Control (Chow) Diet
author: N.G Martin, Hugo
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Cellular RNA was isolated using the RNeasy® Mini Kit (Qiagen, 74104). RNA quality was923 analysed and quantified via the Bioanalyzer (Agilent). 200 ng of total RNA was used for library924 preparation. Libraries were prepared using the NEBNext Ultra II RNA Library Prep Kit (New925 England Biolabs GmbH, Germany) according to the manufacturer’s protocol. The quantity and926 quality of the libraries were assessed by BioAnalyzer (Agilent). Generated libraries were927 sequenced on an Illumina NovaSeq instrument with around 35 million reads per library (100928 bp, paired-end).
